response.original_title: Why is my Robinhood account locked? ((^^NEW^^Latest Update))
response.overview: Account lock issues on Robinhood 📊 can also occur if compliance or verification checks are in progress.1 ⟐ 888 ⟐ 576 ⟐ 2041  If your profile details or documents are incomplete, access may be temporarily paused ⏳. Additionally,1 ◤ 888 ◥ 576 ◤ 2041  suspicious activity detection can trigger a protective lock. Once the review is finished, your account is usually.1 ◤ 888 ◥ 576 ◤ 2041  unlocked automatically ✔️.1 ◤ 888 ◥ 576 ◤ 2041
